about.title: About Me
about.p1: With over 5 years of experience as a full-stack developer, I specialize in building scalable architectures and optimizing performance, with a strong focus on frontend technologies.
about.p2: I am passionate about solving complex technical challenges and mentoring developers to align technical execution with business outcomes. My goal is to create applications that enhance user experience and efficiency through collaborative leadership and innovative problem-solving.

chat.initial_message: Hi! I'm Burak's AI assistant. Ask me anything about his experience or skills!

projects.title: Engineering Case Studies & Public Build Work
projects.subtitle: Selected side projects reframed around production readiness, security, data correctness, and system design.
projects.showcaseDescription: Independent product builds positioned as production-readiness, system-design, security, and release-hardening case studies.

ritualgymtracker.summary: Workout tracking case study around offline-first sync, guest migration, and timezone-safe streak logic.
ritualgymtracker.impactAreas: Offline sync · Auth migration · DST-safe analytics

bookmarkanalyzer.summary: Bookmark intelligence case study covering local-first data, AI enrichment, SSRF defense, and reader sanitization.
bookmarkanalyzer.impactAreas: Local-first data · AI enrichment · SSRF defense · Sanitization

subtrackerrr.summary: Subscription tracking case study focused on financial correctness, Firebase auth safety, and persistence integrity.
subtrackerrr.impactAreas: Currency correctness · Session safety · Firestore integrity

fintrackerrr.summary: Portfolio analytics case study around normalized asset data, dividend insights, and large-table UI performance.
fintrackerrr.impactAreas: Data normalization · Portfolio UX · Dividend insights
